parameters.query:
INSERT INTO message_status_events
  (twilio_message_sid, message_status, error_code, raw_payload, received_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageSid }}',
  '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}',
  {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode ? "'" + $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($('Webhook').item.json.body).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
);

UPDATE messages
   SET twilio_status     = 'sent',
       sent_at      = COALESCE(sent_at,
                       CASE WHEN 'sent' IN ('sent','delivered')
                            THEN NOW() END),
       delivered_at = COALESCE(delivered_at,
                       CASE WHEN 'sent' = 'delivered'
                            THEN NOW() END)
 WHERE twilio_sid = 'SMa4c532172974635b6ad9a86df5f1a25b'
   AND twilio_status NOT IN ('delivered','failed','undelivered');

UPDATE messages
   SET twilio_status     = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}',
       twilio_error_code = COALESCE(
         {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode ? "'" + $('Webhook').item.json.body.ErrorCode + "'" : 'NULL' }},
         twilio_error_code
       ),
       sent_at      = COALESCE(sent_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' IN ('sent','delivered')
                            THEN NOW() END),
       delivered_at = COALESCE(delivered_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' = 'delivered'
                            THEN NOW() END),
       failed_at    = COALESCE(failed_at,
                       CASE WHEN '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageStatus }}' IN ('failed','undelivered')
                            THEN NOW() END)
 WHERE twilio_sid = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.MessageSid }}'
   AND twilio_status NOT IN ('delivered','failed','undelivered');
